conbody.p: The ebpf_ctl utility is available to dump interface, drops, flows, nexthops, routes, labels, tunnels, different forUS maps and more on the vRouter, for Cloud-Native Router deployed with eBPF XDP datapath. The various commands are provided below:
Dump flow key and related stats:
Dump flow keys along with nexthop (NH) information:

p.b: Dump NH information for a flow and resolves composite NHs in datapath (vRouter agent does not use composite NHs in datapath); fat flow resolution supported:

conbody.codeblock: sudo ./ebpf_ctl -k/--dump_flow sip sport dip dport fat_flow_sport_wild fat_flow_dport_wild fat_flow_sip_bits fat_flow_dip_bits ipproto zone
conbody.p: Dump interface information and related forwarding/drop stats:

p.b: Dump information related to logical interface for receiving packets from host and stats:

conbody.p: Dump NH associated with label and resolves composite NHs in datapath (vRouter agent does not use composite NHs in eBPF datapath):
Dump NH associated with route and resolves composite NHs in datapath (vRouter agent does not use composite NHs in eBPF datapath):
Dump forUS entries; used for ARPs and ICMP requests to virtual gateway:
conbody.codeblock: sudo ./ebpf_ctl -q/--dump_forus ifindex ethertype dport ipproto reply
conbody.p: Dump label attribute information where label is interpreted as a logical interface:

p.b: Dump logical interface information where interface, ip or port is interpreted as a logical interface for underlay traffic:

conbody.p: Debug traces are enabled by default in linear mode to catch startup issues. Error traces are always on defaulting to linear mode that controls debug and error trace buffer wrapping policy. Enabling trace drops sends kernel drops to userspace to traverse userspace datapath to allow tracing of packets through pipeline.
conbody.codeblock: sudo ./ebpf_ctl -b/--debug_enable {0 | 1} circular {0 | 1} trace drops {0 | 1} error circular
conbody.p: Enable debug trace key filtering where appropriate in the userspace forwarding path; only filters traces where key is checked for in pipeline:
conbody.codeblock: sudo ./ebpf_ctl -c/--debug_key_enable sip sport dip dport ipproto zone
conbody.p: Dump traces – debug or error; 0 for basic traces or 1 for error traces:
Clear traces – debug or error; 0 for basic traces or 1 for error traces:

p.b: Dump performance metrics for userspace datapath packet handling time and agent flow miss time:

conbody.p: Clears performance metrics for userspace datapath packet handling time and agent flow miss time:
